perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is live-action. Close-up of two wooden bento boxes filled with rice, colorful vegetables, and a meat curry sauce. (2) A woman's hands hold a colorful 'Simba' branded food pouch and a plastic rice container against a clean white kitchen counter. (3) A woman in a white tank top uses pink chopsticks to add broccoli, baby corn, and red peppers into a pan of boiling water. (4) She drops the meal pouch into the boiling water and then places the rice container into a microwave, smiling directly at the camera. (5) She begins assembling the bento, using chopsticks to mold the rice and scissors to cut thin strips of dark seaweed. (6) She meticulously plates the cooked vegetables and pours the thick brown meat sauce from the pouch into the wooden compartments. (7) She adds a soft-boiled egg half and uses seaweed pieces to create a smiley face on a mound of white rice. (8) Transition to a young boy in a striped shirt sitting at a table looking at his meal. (9) A second boy with glasses opens the wooden lid of his bento box, revealing a wide, happy smile and expressive eyes. (10) The boys look down at their food with excitement and anticipation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, playful acoustic guitar melody with light percussion starts. The faint sound of water bubbling and sizzling is present in the background. (2) Music continues at a steady, rhythmic pace. A high-pitched microwave 'ding' sound effect plays briefly. (3) The rhythmic snip of scissors and the soft clicking of wooden chopsticks are audible over the background music. (4) The BGM remains consistent in volume and cheerful tone throughout the assembly process. (5) A friendly, high-pitched female voice is heard asking, 'Hǎochī ma?' (Is it tasty?). (6) A young child's voice responds with a quick, unintelligible but excited exclamation. (7) The female voice responds warmly with 'Duì a' (Yeah) as the music concludes with a final chord.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '準備的材料有' (Ingredients prepared), '時蔬配菜煮熟' (Vegetables and side dishes cooked). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '(不負責任字幕) 好燙' (Irresponsible subtitle: So hot) - humorous tone regarding the boiling water. (3) Functional Text: '料理包泡個溫泉' (Cooking pack taking a hot spring bath), '米飯三溫暖' (Rice sauna). (4) Functional Text: '白飯弄個造型' (Rice making a shape), '海苔剪頭髮' (Seaweed cutting hair). (5) Functional Text: '組合在一起' (Put together), '菜菜拿來擺漂亮' (Veggies used for pretty plating), '站好玉米筍' (Stand up baby corn). (6) Functional Text: '不唔唔青椒' (No bell peppers), '再做一個' (Make another one), '一樣菜菜擺好' (Veggies placed the same). (7) Functional Text: '肉肉要有' (Must have meat), '太乾會噎到' (Too dry will cause choking), '蛋蛋好吃' (Egg is tasty). (8) Functional Text: '剪剪貼貼' (Cutting and sticking), '原來是眼睛' (It turns out they are eyes), '五告勾錐' (So cute). (9) Decorative/Effect Text: '(滿滿的情緒價值)' (Full of emotional value), '很開心笑臉' (Happy smiley face) - emphasizing the children's reaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Step-by-step cooking/assembly -> Result and child reaction

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female adult creator, 2 young boys (one in striped shirt, one with glasses)
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult female with her hair pulled back, wearing a white ribbed tank top and having brown nail polish.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white countertops and white cabinetry, followed by a living/dining area with a white sofa and soft lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting that highlights food textures
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Natural and warm, high saturation on the food items

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Step-by-step Process -> Emotional Payoff
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote 'Simba' meal pouches by demonstrating how easily and quickly a parent can create a visually appealing, cute, and nutritious 'smiley face' bento box for their children. It highlights the convenience for busy parents while emphasizing the 'emotional value' and joy it brings to the kids, as shown in the final reaction sequence.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently displays the 'Simba' branded meal pouch at the beginning and uses its contents as the primary component of the meal.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of humorous, 'irresponsible' parent-style subtitles and high-quality food close-ups.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges the gap between commercial product placement and authentic family lifestyle content by focusing on the child's reaction as the ultimate validation of the product's worth.
